24) What is a direct plan? 
 
SEBI has mandated mutual funds to compulsorily launch a direct plan for direct investments, i.e., 
investments not routed through a distributor, from 01 January 2013 in addition to regular plan. 
Such direct plan has a lower expense ratio compared to regular plan as there is no distribution 
expenses and no commission is to be paid from such plans. The direct plan also has a separate 
NAV.
